rulings.Case Title: SOFIA NEW ET AL VS. MANUEL LANGIT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 21, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTs SOFIA NEW and JOSEPH NEW's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFRL 2.7B (no courtesy copy of demurrer papers and operative cross-complaint provided) and CCP 430.41.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIDNEY UNOBSKEY VS. SIMON MICHAEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 21, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT GEO GROUT GROUND MODIFICATION SPECIALISTS INC.'s MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint GRANTED. Cross-complaint to be filed and served forthwith. No opposition filed.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALBARO MARTINEZ VS. ANA MARIA TELEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 21, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs MARCELLO GALLARDO and ANA TELLEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states sufficient facts for an unlawful detainer cause of action and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)
